log.context:
The `isActive` function first calls `isActiveSameDomain` (which does URL parsing), and if that returns false, it falls through to compare `link.path` directly. Since `isActiveSameDomain` already checks `linkUrl.pathname === window.location.pathname` for same-domain links, and all nav links are same-domain (except those marked `external: true` which return early), the `link.path` fallback at lines 54-57 is dead code for all current nav entries. It won't cause bugs, just unnecessary branching.
